expectations.text: Code-behind applies ForceTopmost fix via SetWindowPos P/Invoke
expectations.evidence: Lines 62-70: ForceTopmost method calls Win32Api.SetWindowPos with HWND_TOPMOST

expectations.text: Code-behind hides window from Alt+Tab via WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW
expectations.evidence: Lines 78-85: HideFromAltTab sets WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW extended style via GetWindowLong/SetWindowLong

expectations.text: Implements drag-to-move via DragMove() on MouseLeftButtonDown
expectations.evidence: Lines 47-52: Window_MouseLeftButtonDown event calls DragMove() when left button is pressed

expectations.text: Shortcuts are grouped by category in the UI
expectations.evidence: Line 50: ShortcutListControl uses Categories binding for grouped display
Line 23: class FloatingWidgetWindow : Window, IOverlayMode; Lines 92-115: implements ShowOverlay, HideOverlay, ToggleVisibility

expectations.text: Uses data binding to a ViewModel rather than hardcoded data
expectations.evidence: Line 28: DataContext = viewModel; Line 33-50: Bindings to viewModel properties (CurrentAppName, AllProfiles, SearchFilter, FilteredCategories)
